sources.title: Mr & Mrs Khiladi 1997 DVDRip X 264 DD 5.1 E Subs [ DDR]

metadata.Plot: When his astrologer uncle (Satish Kaushik) predicts a favorable future for Raja (Akshay Kumar), he decides to nothing until the prediction comes true. When he meets Shalu (Juhi Chawla) the daughter of a millionaire (Kadar Khan) he decides his predicted future has arrived. However his lazy lifestyle does not meet with his future father-in-law's standards, and he insists that Raja does some hard work for a change.
metadata.Actors: Akshay Kumar, Juhi Chawla, Paresh Rawal
